# BP-143 negative: the go-redis Get Result error is checked.
lang: go
file: BP-143-safe.go
variant: redis-get-result-checked
---
package sample

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

func loadName(ctx context.Context, rdb *redis.Client, key string) (string, error) {
	value, err := rdb.Get(ctx, key).Result()
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}
	return value, nil
}
